name: shutter
title: Shutter
description: Vertical-bar mask reveal — like venetian blinds opening.

0%.-webkit-mask-image: repeating-linear-gradient(to right, black 0, black calc(100% / var(--trickle-shutter-bars, 8) / 2), transparent calc(100% / var(--trickle-shutter-bars, 8) / 2), transparent calc(100% / var(--trickle-shutter-bars, 8)))
0%.mask-image: repeating-linear-gradient(to right, black 0, black calc(100% / var(--trickle-shutter-bars, 8) / 2), transparent calc(100% / var(--trickle-shutter-bars, 8) / 2), transparent calc(100% / var(--trickle-shutter-bars, 8)))
